about.summary: Erasmus housing Thessaloniki Mpotsari is a cozy private student accommodation choice in Eastern Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed studio is ideal for students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Erasmus Housing Thessaloniki Mpotsari
sections.content: Erasmus housing Thessaloniki Mpotsari offers a cozy, fully equipped student housing setup. Designed for one tenant, this private studio features practical appliances and a comfortable layout that avoids the need for shared spaces.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed for single occupancy.
Ideal for students: Dedicated workspace and central transport links.
Fully equipped: Microwave, oven, private kitchenware, washing machine, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location in Eastern Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in Eastern Thessaloniki near Mpotsari offers great city convenience. Local essentials like supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are all within 50 meters, and bus lines are right nearby.
highlights: Easy commute: Bus stop is just 50 meters away with direct routes to Aristotle University and City College.
Comfortable area: Located in a pleasant residential neighbourhood with everything close by.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This Erasmus housing Thessaloniki Mpotsari is ideal for exchange students, Cedefop interns, and digital nomads. For university information, visit the official pages of Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the complex, view our Mpotsari student studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

seo.seo_description: Erasmus housing Thessaloniki Mpotsari is a cozy 1-bed student accommodation option in Eastern Thessaloniki. Perfect for students & digital nomads.
